SHORT NAME: SPCH_LANG_HEARG_TXNMY_IND 
LONG NAME: SPCH_LANG_HEARG_TXNMY_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR

FILE(S):

SOURCE:

VALUES:

1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
231H00000X: Audiologist 
231HA2400X: Audiologist — assistive technology practitioner 
231HA2500X: Audiologist — assistive technology supplier
